## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 00, KITTI 05, KITTI 08 — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § IV. Experimental Evaluation, Table I;Fig. 6
- **input_unit:** single 3D LiDAR scan — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–2, § Abstract;III. Proposed Method, Fig. 1
- **invariances:** rotation, translation (conditional on consistent segmentation and rigid transformation) — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § III-C. Rotation and Translation Invariant;IV-A. Rotation and Translation Invariant Experiments, Eq. 1-2;Fig. 4-5
- **representation:** downsampling and ground removal, Cluster-All Euclidean segments, egocenter from upper layers of two largest segments, PCA-and-voting dominant direction, 20x60 ring-sector relative-distance matrix, normalized cross-correlation, ring-key KD-tree retrieval — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § III-A. Point Cloud Segmentation;III-B. Egocenter Determination;III-C. Topological Information;III-D. Descriptor Generation;III-E. Similarity Measurement;III-F. Fast Retrieval, Algorithm 1;Fig. 1-3
- **uses_learning:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–4, § III. Proposed Method, Algorithm 1;Fig. 1-3
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–2, § Abstract;III. Proposed Method, Fig. 1
